create-pdf-with-acroform-text-field.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Text Field
create-pdf-with-acroform-text-field.description: Shows how to create a new PDF, add a blank page, and place a TextBoxField (AcroForm) on the first page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-top-checkbox.title: Create PDF with Top‑Positioned Checkbox Field
create-pdf-with-top-checkbox.description: Shows how to generate a new PDF, add an AcroForm, and place a checkbox field near the top of the page.

create-gender-radio-button-pdf.title: Create PDF with Gender Radio Button AcroForm
create-gender-radio-button-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a new PDF, add an AcroForm radio button group for gender selection, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-listbox.title: Create PDF with List Box Form Field
create-pdf-with-listbox.description: Shows how to generate a new PDF, add an AcroForm list box, populate it with country options, and save the file.

fill-pdf-text-field.title: Fill PDF Text Field Using Aspose.Pdf
fill-pdf-text-field.description: Loads an existing PDF, locates a text form field by its name, assigns a provided string value, and saves the updated document.

set-pdf-checkbox-field.title: Set PDF Checkbox Field
set-pdf-checkbox-field.description: Loads an existing PDF, locates a checkbox form field, sets its checked state based on a boolean value, and saves the modified document.

select-radio-button-in-pdf-form.title: Select Radio Button in PDF Form
select-radio-button-in-pdf-form.description: Loads a PDF, locates a radio button field by its name, sets the desired option value, and saves the modified document.

select-listbox-item-in-pdf-form.title: Select ListBox Item in PDF Form
select-listbox-item-in-pdf-form.description: Loads a PDF, retrieves a ListBox form field by name, sets its selected index, and saves the updated document.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-dictionary.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from a Dictionary
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-dictionary.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating over its form fields, and assigning values from a dictionary of field names to the corresponding fields, then saving the updated document.

read-pdf-form-field-value.title: Read PDF Form Field Value
read-pdf-form-field-value.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a form field by its name, retrieve the field's current value, and output it to the console.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all form field values, and serialize them into a JSON string using the ExportToJson method.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to XFDF XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF containing form fields and exporting the form data to an XFDF XML file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfdf-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Form Data into PDF
import-xfdf-form-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import form field values from an XFDF (XML) file, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, checking its existence, and exporting all form fields to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-data-from-json.title: Import Form Data from JSON into PDF
import-form-data-from-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import form field values from a JSON string using Aspose.Pdf, and save the populated document.

add-submit-button-post-form-data-xfdf.title: Add Submit Button to PDF to Post Form Data as XFDF
add-submit-button-post-form-data-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a submit button in a PDF form that posts the form data to a remote XML endpoint using XFDF format via Aspose.Pdf.

add-blank-page-to-pdf-form.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Form
add-blank-page-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF form, append a new blank page, and save the document while preserving all existing form fields.

add-new-page-with-acroform-fields.title: Add New Page with AcroForm Fields to PDF
add-new-page-with-acroform-fields.description: Shows how to append a blank page to an existing PDF and place fresh AcroForm text box and checkbox fields on that page using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-form-field-from-pdf.title: Delete a Form Field from PDF
delete-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, verify a form field's existence by name, delete that field, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields to Create a Plain PDF
flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten all form fields to retain their visual appearance while removing interactivity, and save the result as a non‑interactive PDF.

style-pdf-form-field-border.title: Style PDF Form Field Border Color and Width
style-pdf-form-field-border.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a form field widget, and apply corporate border color and width using Aspose.Pdf.

highlight-required-form-fields.title: Highlight Required Form Fields in PDF
highlight-required-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its form fields, mark them as required, and change their background color to highlight required input areas using Aspose.Pdf.

set-font-size-style-pdf-text-field.title: Set Font Size and Style for a PDF Text Field
set-font-size-style-pdf-text-field.description: Shows how to add a TextBoxField to a PDF and configure its font name, size, color, and minimum/maximum font sizes using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-form-fields-read-only.title: Set PDF Form Fields to Read‑Only
set-pdf-form-fields-read-only.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over widget annotations representing form fields, mark each field as read‑only, and save the updated document.

mark-pdf-form-field-as-required.title: Mark PDF Form Field as Required
mark-pdf-form-field-as-required.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a specific form field, set its Required property to true, and save the updated document.

add-tooltip-to-pdf-form-field.title: Add Tooltip to PDF Form Field
add-tooltip-to-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a text box form field and set a tooltip (using AlternateName) to guide the expected input format.

set-default-value-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Default Value for a PDF Form Field
set-default-value-for-pdf-form-field.description: Creates a PDF, adds a text box form field, and defines its default text and appearance so the value is shown when the PDF opens.

add-text-annotation-save-modified-pdf.title: Add Text Annotation and Save Modified PDF
add-text-annotation-save-modified-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a text annotation to the first page, and save the modified document to a new file, preserving the original.

incremental-update-pdf-form.title: Incrementally Update PDF Form Fields
incremental-update-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with a read/write stream, modifying form fields, and saving the document using Aspose.PDF's incremental update feature to retain previous revisions.

batch-fill-identical-form-fields.title: Batch Fill Identical Form Fields in PDFs
batch-fill-identical-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over a folder of PDF files and set the same form field values in each document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-import-xml-into-pdfs.title: Batch Import XML Data into Multiple PDFs
batch-import-xml-into-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, bind matching XML data to each document to fill form fields, and save the resulting PDFs to an output directory.

batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Batch Export PDF Form Data to XML
batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, load each with Aspose.Pdf, and export its form data to separate XML files.

convert-form-data-json-to-csv.title: Convert Form Data JSON to CSV
convert-form-data-json-to-csv.description: Reads a JSON file containing an array of form records, extracts the fields, and writes them to a CSV file for easy spreadsheet import.

validate-required-form-fields.title: Validate Required Form Fields Before Saving PDF
validate-required-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to check that all required form fields in a PDF are filled before allowing the document to be saved, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-acroform-textbox-absolute-coordinate.title: Add AcroForm TextBox at Absolute Coordinates
add-acroform-textbox-absolute-coordinate.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with an AcroForm text box field positioned using absolute coordinates and adding a second appearance of the same field on the same page.

create-acroform-textbox-with-margins.title: Create AcroForm TextBox with Page Margins
create-acroform-textbox-with-margins.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing an AcroForm text box positioned relative to the page margins using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-xfa-form-data-to-xml.title: Extract XFA Form Data from PDF to XML
extract-xfa-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF, verify it contains an XFA form, retrieve the XFA data package (XDP) and save it as an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfa-data-from-xml-into-pdf.title: Import XFA Form Data from XML into PDF
import-xfa-data-from-xml-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load XFA XML data and assign it to an existing PDF that contains an XFA form using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-pdfs-with-acroform-field-renaming.title: Merge PDFs with AcroForm Field Renaming
merge-pdfs-with-acroform-field-renaming.description: Demonstrates how to merge two PDF files that contain AcroForm fields while renaming the fields in the second document to prevent name conflicts.

flatten-pdf-form-fields-after-filling.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields After Filling
flatten-pdf-form-fields-after-filling.description: Loads a PDF, fills specific form fields (text box, checkbox, combo box) and then flattens the form so the content becomes part of the page and non‑editable before saving.

detect-flattened-pdf-modify-form-field.title: Detect Flattened PDF and Modify Form Field
detect-flattened-pdf-modify-form-field.description: The example loads a PDF, checks whether it has been flattened (i.e., form fields removed), and if not, updates a specific form field before saving the document.

set-form-field-appearance-custom-font.title: Set Form Field Appearance with a Custom Font
set-form-field-appearance-custom-font.description: Shows how to load an external TrueType font and apply it to a PDF textbox form field using Aspose.Pdf, ensuring the font is embedded in the output PDF.

rotate-form-field-label.title: Rotate PDF Form Field Label
rotate-form-field-label.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a form field label by 45 degrees using Aspose.Pdf by rotating a Rectangle and adding a read‑only TextBoxField to a PDF document.

hide-pdf-form-field.title: Hide PDF Form Field Using Aspose.Pdf
hide-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to hide a PDF form field by setting the Hidden annotation flag (or adding a HideAction) with Aspose.Pdf in C#.

set-form-field-visible-non-printable.title: Set Form Field Visible but Non-Printable in PDF
set-form-field-visible-non-printable.description: Shows how to make an AcroForm field visible on screen while suppressing its printing using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

import-xfa-form-data-from-xml-string.title: Import XFA Form Data from XML String
import-xfa-form-data-from-xml-string.description: Demonstrates how to load XFA form data from an XML string and assign it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, then save the updated PDF.

export-pdf-form-data-to-pretty-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Pretty-Printed JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-pretty-json.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, configuring JSON export options for indentation, and exporting all form fields to a formatted JSON file.

import-form-data-from-compressed-json.title: Import Form Data from Compressed JSON into PDF
import-form-data-from-compressed-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, decompress a GZIP‑compressed JSON payload, import the data into the PDF form using ImportFromJson, and save the filled document.

create-multi-page-pdf-with-different-acr.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF with Different AcroForm Fields
create-multi-page-pdf-with-different-acr.description: Demonstrates generating a PDF with three pages, each containing a distinct AcroForm field type (text box, checkbox, and radio button group).

copy-form-field-to-another-page.title: Copy Form Field to Another Page in PDF
copy-form-field-to-another-page.description: Shows how to duplicate an existing form field and place it on a different page of the same PDF, including adjusting its appearance rectangle.

rename-pdf-form-field.title: Rename PDF Form Field Programmatically
rename-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to locate an existing form field in a PDF, change its Name, MappingName, and tooltip, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

clone-pdf-form-field-to-another-page.title: Clone PDF Form Field to Another Page
clone-pdf-form-field-to-another-page.description: Demonstrates how to duplicate an existing form field, modify its properties, and place the cloned field on a different PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

assign-javascript-onlostfocus-to-pdf-for.title: Assign JavaScript OnLostFocus Action to PDF Form Field
assign-javascript-onlostfocus-to-pdf-for.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, locating a form field, attaching a JavaScript action that runs when the field loses focus, and saving the modified document.

add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to create a push button on a PDF form that posts all form field data to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.

add-reset-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Reset Button to PDF Form
add-reset-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a push‑button into an existing PDF that clears all user‑entered form data by executing JavaScript.

set-calculation-order-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Calculation Order for PDF Form Fields
set-calculation-order-for-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to enable automatic recalculation, define a calculation order, and attach a JavaScript calculation to PDF form fields using Aspose.Pdf.

add-numeric-field-range-validation.title: Add Numeric Field with Range Validation to PDF
add-numeric-field-range-validation.description: Demonstrates creating a NumberField in a PDF, restricting input characters, and attaching JavaScript to enforce a minimum and maximum numeric value.

list-pdf-form-field-names.title: List PDF Form Field Names
list-pdf-form-field-names.description: Loads a PDF document, accesses its AcroForm, and prints the names of all form fields contained in the file.

filter-pdf-form-textbox-fields-using-lin.title: Filter PDF Form TextBox Fields Using LINQ
filter-pdf-form-textbox-fields-using-lin.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, retrieving its form fields, and using LINQ to select only TextBoxField instances, optionally filtering by field name.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Schema
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract its form field definitions, and export them to a JSON file that describes field types and constraints.

import-acroform-fields-from-json.title: Import AcroForm Fields from JSON into PDF
import-acroform-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to deserialize a JSON schema and recreate AcroForm fields in a newly generated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

fill-pdf-form-and-encrypt.title: Fill PDF Form Fields and Apply AES-256 Encryption
fill-pdf-form-and-encrypt.description: The example loads a PDF containing form fields, sets values for a text box, checkbox, and combo box, then protects the document with user/owner passwords, specific permissions, and AES‑256 encryption before saving.

digitally-sign-filled-pdf-form.title: Digitally Sign a Filled PDF Form
digitally-sign-filled-pdf-form.description: Shows how to add a signature field to a PDF that already contains filled form fields and apply a PKCS#7 digital signature using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-metadata-after-form-filling.title: Set PDF Metadata After Form Filling
set-pdf-metadata-after-form-filling.description: Loads a PDF, fills a form field, sets the document's author and title metadata, and saves the updated file.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Byte Array
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, setting values of its form fields, and returning the updated PDF as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.

async-import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.title: Asynchronously Import XML Form Data into a PDF
async-import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates reading XFA XML form data asynchronously, assigning it to a PDF form, and saving the updated PDF without blocking the main thread.

parallel-batch-fill-pdf-form-fields.title: Parallel Batch Fill PDF Form Fields
parallel-batch-fill-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to fill form fields in multiple PDFs concurrently with Parallel.ForEach, improving batch processing performance.

log-pdf-form-field-modifications.title: Log PDF Form Field Modifications to a File
log-pdf-form-field-modifications.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF form fields, change their values, and write each original and new value to a log file for audit and troubleshooting.

list-filled-form-fields-in-pdfs.title: List Filled Form Fields in PDFs
list-filled-form-fields-in-pdfs.description: The example scans a folder of PDF files, loads each document with Aspose.Pdf, checks for the presence of form fields, and prints each field's name and its current value.

compare-pdf-form-data-diff-report.title: Compare PDF Form Data and Generate Diff Report
compare-pdf-form-data-diff-report.description: Demonstrates how to compare the form fields of two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf and produce both JSON and visual PDF diff reports.

create-pdf-template-with-form-placeholde.title: Create PDF Template with Form Placeholders
create-pdf-template-with-form-placeholde.description: Shows how to build a PDF document containing form fields (text boxes, checkbox, signature) that serve as placeholders for dynamic data.

set-current-date-in-pdf-form-field.title: Set Current Date in PDF Form Field
set-current-date-in-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a DateField form field, set a custom display format, assign the current system date, and save the updated document.

create-multi-select-list-box.title: Create Multi-Select List Box in PDF
create-multi-select-list-box.description: Shows how to add a list box form field to a PDF, enable multi‑selection, populate options, and pre‑select multiple items using Aspose.Pdf.

populate-combobox-from-database.title: Populate ComboBox Field from Database in PDF
populate-combobox-from-database.description: Demonstrates how to create a ComboBox form field in a PDF and fill its options with values retrieved from a database using Aspose.Pdf.

add-signature-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Signature Field to PDF Form
add-signature-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a signature field into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf so users can apply handwritten digital signatures.

extract-signature-field-image.title: Extract Signature Field Appearance as Image
extract-signature-field-image.description: Demonstrates how to locate signature fields in a PDF, extract their visual appearance as a JPEG image, and save the images for audit‑logging purposes.

set-max-length-pdf-text-form-field.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Text Form Field
set-max-length-pdf-text-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field, set its MaxLen property to restrict user input, and save the updated document.

enable-spell-checking-textbox-field.title: Enable Spell Checking for a PDF Text Box Field
enable-spell-checking-textbox-field.description: Shows how to create a PDF form, add a TextBoxField, and enable spell checking using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to read all form fields from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write their names and values to an XML file for offline data collection.

validate-xml-xsd-import-pdf-xfa.title: Validate XML against XSD and Import into PDF XFA Form
validate-xml-xsd-import-pdf-xfa.description: The example validates an XML file using an XSD schema and, if valid, imports the XML data into an XFA form inside a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

populate-pdf-form-from-xml-xslt.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from XML using XSLT
populate-pdf-form-from-xml-xslt.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF template, applying an XSLT transformation to XML data, and binding the transformed data to the PDF form fields before saving the result.

create-pdf-with-acroform-calculation-js.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Fields and Calculation JavaScript
create-pdf-with-acroform-calculation-js.description: Demonstrates how to add AcroForm text fields to a PDF, attach a JavaScript action that calculates a total from quantity and price, and enable automatic recalculation.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all AcroForm field details, and writes them to a CSV file for external analysis.

add-hidden-session-identifier-field-to-p.title: Add Hidden Session Identifier Field to PDF
add-hidden-session-identifier-field-to-p.description: Demonstrates how to insert a hidden, read‑only text box form field into a PDF to store a session identifier for backend tracking.

set-default-appearance-for-pdf-form-fiel.title: Set Default Appearance for PDF Form Field
set-default-appearance-for-pdf-form-fiel.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a TextBox form field, and define its default appearance (font, size, and color) using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf-stream.title: Export PDF Form Data to XFDF Stream
export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf-stream.description: Demonstrates how to stream a PDF's form annotations as XFDF XML directly to an output stream, enabling immediate download via an HTTP response.

import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import XML Form Data into PDF from Network Stream
import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to download XFA XML form data via HttpClient, assign it to a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's Form.AssignXfa, and save the updated PDF.

bulk-fill-pdf-form-with-json-skip-missin.title: Bulk Fill PDF Form with JSON and Skip Missing Fields
bulk-fill-pdf-form-with-json-skip-missin.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF form, reading JSON data, and bulk‑filling fields while gracefully skipping any fields missing from the JSON.

create-pdf-with-xmp-metadata-fallback-xm.title: Create PDF with XMP Metadata and Fallback XML Values
create-pdf-with-xmp-metadata-fallback-xm.description: Loads an XML file, retrieves a field value with a default fallback, and writes it as a custom XMP metadata property in a newly created PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-dashed-border-on-pdf-form-field.title: Set Dashed Border on PDF Form Field
set-dashed-border-on-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a specific form field, and apply a dashed border style using Aspose.Pdf before saving the document.

set-beveled-border-style-for-pdf-form-fi.title: Set Beveled Border Style for PDF Form Field
set-beveled-border-style-for-pdf-form-fi.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a text box form field, and apply a beveled border style to give the field a three‑dimensional appearance.

apply-background-image-to-pdf-form-field.title: Apply Background Image to PDF Form Field
apply-background-image-to-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to set an image as the background of a specific form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-indented-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Indented JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-indented-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, configure export options, and write all form fields to a formatted JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-data-from-json-api.title: Import Form Data from JSON API into PDF
import-form-data-from-json-api.description: The example fetches JSON form data from a REST endpoint, loads a PDF template, imports the data into the PDF form fields using Form.ImportFromJson, and saves the populated document.

create-rtl-textbox-form-field.title: Create RTL TextBox Form Field in PDF
create-rtl-textbox-form-field.description: Shows how to add a text box form field that supports right‑to‑left languages (e.g., Arabic) by setting alignment, a Unicode font, and the document language.

center-align-text-field.title: Center Align Text Field in PDF
center-align-text-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a TextBox form field, and set its horizontal (and optionally vertical) alignment to center using Aspose.Pdf.

create-right-aligned-numeric-text-field.title: Create Right-Aligned Numeric Text Field in PDF
create-right-aligned-numeric-text-field.description: Shows how to add a numeric text field to an existing PDF and set its horizontal alignment to right using Aspose.Pdf.

add-date-picker-field-to-pdf.title: Add Date Picker Field to PDF with JavaScript
add-date-picker-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a DateField into a PDF, configure its display format, and attach a JavaScript action that fills the field with the current date when activated, using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-field-formatted-currency.title: Create PDF Form Field with Formatted Currency Value
create-pdf-form-field-formatted-currency.description: Demonstrates how to add a RichTextBox form field to a PDF and set its value with a currency format that includes the symbol and thousand separators.

validate-email-field-before-saving-pdf.title: Validate Email Field Before Saving PDF
validate-email-field-before-saving-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, retrieves the 'email' form field, checks that its value contains an '@' character, and saves the document only if the validation succeeds.

remove-form-field-from-pdf.title: Remove a Form Field from a PDF
remove-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, verify the existence of a specific form field, and delete that field using Aspose.Pdf's Form collection.

insert-form-field-at-specific-index.title: Insert Form Field at Specific Index in PDF
insert-form-field-at-specific-index.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextBoxField, and inserting it at a chosen index within the document's Form collection using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-acroform-open-js.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Text Field and Open-Action JavaScript
create-pdf-with-acroform-open-js.description: Demonstrates how to add an AcroForm text box to a PDF and assign a document-level JavaScript action that runs when the file is opened.

export-pdf-form-data-to-compressed-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Compressed JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-compressed-json.description: Demonstrates how to extract form fields from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, serialize them to JSON, and compress the output with GZip for efficient storage or transmission.

import-encrypted-xfa-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import Encrypted XFA Form Data into PDF
import-encrypted-xfa-form-data-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt an encrypted XFA XML file and import its form data into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-rich-text-field-html.title: Set Rich Text Field Value with HTML in PDF
set-rich-text-field-html.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a RichTextBox form field, assign HTML‑formatted content via the FormattedValue property, optionally apply a style, and save the updated document.

import-form-data-from-json__v2.title: Import Form Data from JSON into PDF
import-form-data-from-json__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF, bulk import form field values from a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf, and save the updated document.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-custom-root.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML with Custom Root Element
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-custom-root.description: Demonstrates how to export form fields from a PDF to XML using Aspose.Pdf, then rename the XML root element to a custom name required by an external system.

add-calculated-total-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Calculated Total Field to PDF Form
add-calculated-total-field-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add numeric fields to a PDF form and use JavaScript to calculate a running total displayed in a read‑only field.

set-datefield-default-time.title: Set DateField Default Time in PDF
set-datefield-default-time.description: Demonstrates adding a DateField to a PDF, configuring its display format to HH:mm:ss, and setting the current system time as the default value using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field.title: Create PDF Form with Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document that contains a read‑only barcode form field (Code128) using Aspose.Pdf.

add-dynamic-barcode-field-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Barcode Field to PDF
add-dynamic-barcode-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a unique value at runtime and insert it as a Code128 barcode field into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-required-pdf-form-fields-export.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields and Export to JSON
validate-required-pdf-form-fields-export.description: The example checks that all required fields in a PDF form are filled before exporting the form data to a JSON file, preventing incomplete submissions.

verify-pdf-form-field-count.title: Verify PDF Form Field Count and Update a Field
verify-pdf-form-field-count.description: Loads a PDF, checks that the number of form fields matches an expected count using Document.Form.Count, optionally updates a field value, and saves the document.

create-pdf-with-acroform-textbox-margins.title: Create PDF with AcroForm TextBox and Page Margins
create-pdf-with-acroform-textbox-margins.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, set page margins, and add an AcroForm text box field using Aspose.Pdf.

modify-pdf-form-field.title: Modify PDF Form Field Value with Aspose.Pdf
modify-pdf-form-field.description: Loads a PDF, accesses a form field named "SampleField", sets a new value, and saves the updated document.

set-character-limit-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Character Limit for PDF Form Field
set-character-limit-for-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to limit the number of characters a user can enter in a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor class.

get-address-field-character-limit.title: Get Character Limit of Address TextBox Field
get-address-field-character-limit.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its AcroForm, finds the text box named "Address" and reads its maximum character length (MaxLen).

add-checkbox-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Checkbox Field to PDF Form
add-checkbox-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a CheckboxField named 'AgreeTerms', add it to the document's form, and save the updated file.

delete-form-field-from-pdf__v2.title: Delete a Form Field from a PDF
delete-form-field-from-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete a specific form field named 'OldPhoneNumber', and save the updated document.

remove-typewriter-forms-page-3.title: Remove Typewriter Form XObjects from Page 3
remove-typewriter-forms-page-3.description: Demonstrates how to locate form XObjects of type 'Typewriter' on the third page of a PDF using TextFragmentAbsorber and delete them from the page's form resources.

delete-form-fields-on-page.title: Delete Form Fields on a Specific PDF Page
delete-form-fields-on-page.description: Shows how to locate and remove all form fields that appear on page 5 of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

export-acroform-data-to-xfdf-xml.title: Export AcroForm Data to XFDF XML
export-acroform-data-to-xfdf-xml.description: Loads a PDF document, checks its existence, and exports all AcroForm fields to an XFDF (XML) file using Aspose.Pdf's ExportAnnotationsToXfdf method, with basic error handling.

import-acroform-data-from-xfdf-xml.title: Import AcroForm Data from XFDF/XML into PDF
import-acroform-data-from-xfdf-xml.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with an AcroForm, reading field values from an XFDF/XML file, importing them into the document, and saving the updated PDF.

add-submit-button-to-pdf-form__v2.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button-to-pdf-form__v2.description: Shows how to create a push button in a PDF form that posts the form data to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.

add-submit-button-to-pdf.title: Add Submit Button with URL Action to PDF
add-submit-button-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically create a push button on a PDF page and assign a SubmitFormAction that posts the form data to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.

truncate-textboxfield-input-to-max-lengt.title: Truncate TextBoxField Input to Max Length
truncate-textboxfield-input-to-max-lengt.description: Demonstrates how to set a maximum character length for a PDF form TextBoxField using Aspose.Pdf, assign a longer string, and verify that the value is automatically truncated.

apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-fields.title: Apply Custom Font to All PDF Form Fields
apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its form fields, set a custom font, size, and color via the DefaultAppearance property, and save the updated document.

batch-set-comments-field-character-limit.title: Batch Set Comments Field Character Limit in PDFs
batch-set-comments-field-character-limit.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a folder, locate a 'Comments' text box form field, set its MaxLen property to 100 characters, and save the updated PDFs.

generate-form-fields-report.title: Generate PDF Form Fields Report with Character Limits
generate-form-fields-report.description: Loads PDF files, enumerates each form field, extracts the field name, type and maximum character length (when available), and writes the data to a CSV report.

modify-and-flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Modify and Flatten PDF Form Fields with Aspose.Pdf
modify-and-flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF, update text and checkbox fields, delete an unwanted field, flatten the form so fields become static content, and save the result without loading the entire document into memory.

export-acroform-data-to-xfdf.title: Export AcroForm Data to XFDF on Network Share
export-acroform-data-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting its AcroForm fields and saving them as an XFDF file to a UNC network share.

synchronize-xfdf-form-data-across-multip.title: Synchronize XFDF Form Data Across Multiple PDFs
synchronize-xfdf-form-data-across-multip.description: Demonstrates loading XFDF form data once and applying it to several PDF documents in parallel, then saving the synchronized PDFs.

remove-form-fields-first-page.title: Remove Form Fields from First PDF Page
remove-form-fields-first-page.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate all form fields on the first page, delete them, and save the cleaned document as a template.

add-payment-method-radio-button-group.title: Add Payment Method Radio Button Group to PDF
add-payment-method-radio-button-group.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF form with a radio button group named 'PaymentMethod' containing 'Credit' and 'Debit' options using Aspose.Pdf.

set-default-selected-radio-button-value.title: Set Default Selected Radio Button Value in PDF Form
set-default-selected-radio-button-value.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically set the default selected option of a radio button field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multiline-feedback-text-field.title: Add Multiline Feedback Text Field to PDF
add-multiline-feedback-text-field.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with a multiline text box form field named 'Feedback' and enforce a 500‑character limit using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-signature-form-fields.title: Remove Signature Form Fields from PDF
remove-signature-form-fields.description: Shows how to loop through a PDF's form collection, identify fields of type Signature, and delete them using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v2.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read all form fields, and write each field's name and current value to a CSV file.

populate-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from CSV
populate-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.description: Reads a CSV file with header/value pairs, matches the headers to form field names in a PDF template, fills those fields, and saves the populated document.

create-hidden-audit-timestamp-field.title: Create Hidden Audit Timestamp Field in PDF
create-hidden-audit-timestamp-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a hidden DateField to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf to store the document creation timestamp for audit purposes, and optionally set the PDF's creation date metadata.

set-pdf-form-field-read-only.title: Set PDF Form Field to Read‑Only
set-pdf-form-field-read-only.description: Loads a PDF, finds the form field named 'EmployeeID', marks it as read‑only to prevent user edits, and saves the updated document.

flatten-pdf-form-fields__v2.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields
flatten-pdf-form-fields__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten all interactive form fields so the content becomes static, and save the resulting PDF.

copy-form-fields-between-pdfs.title: Copy Form Fields Between PDFs
copy-form-fields-between-pdfs.description: Shows how to load a source and destination PDF, locate each form field's page, and copy the fields into the destination document using Aspose.Pdf's Form.Add method.

create-pdf-dropdown-country.title: Create PDF Dropdown List with Country Options
create-pdf-dropdown-country.description: Shows how to add a ComboBox (dropdown) form field to a PDF and fill it with a predefined array of country names using Aspose.Pdf.

set-default-combobox-selection.title: Set Default Selected Item in PDF ComboBox
set-default-combobox-selection.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a ComboBox form field named "Country", set its default selected value to "United States", and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-numeric-age-field-rejects-non-n.title: Validate Numeric Age Field Rejects Alphabetic Input
validate-numeric-age-field-rejects-non-n.description: The example creates a PDF with a numeric "Age" form field, restricts it to digits, and verifies that assigning alphabetic characters throws an InvalidValueFormatException.

add-calculation-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Calculation Button to PDF Form
add-calculation-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to create quantity, unit price, and total fields in a PDF and attach JavaScript to a button that computes the total price when clicked.

remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf-form-.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF Form Fields
remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf-form-.description: Demonstrates how to strip all JavaScript actions from AcroForm fields and document‑level scripts in a PDF to improve security before distribution.

export-form-field-appearances.title: Export Form Field Appearances to Separate PDFs
export-form-field-appearances.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its form fields, extracts each field's appearance stream, and saves each appearance as an individual one‑page PDF for visual inspection.

assign-custom-appearance-image-to-pdf-bu.title: Assign Custom Appearance Image to PDF Button Field
assign-custom-appearance-image-to-pdf-bu.description: Shows how to load an image file and set it as the appearance stream of a button field in a PDF, including support for XFA forms, using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-xml.title: Batch Convert PDFs to XML Form Data
batch-convert-pdfs-to-xml.description: Shows how to iterate over a directory of PDF files and convert each one to an XML form‑data file with Aspose.Pdf, preserving the original file names.

synchronize-pdf-form-data-xfdf.title: Synchronize PDF Form Data via XFDF
synchronize-pdf-form-data-xfdf.description: Exports form field values from a source PDF to an XFDF (XML) file and imports them into a target PDF, effectively synchronizing the form data between the two documents.

replace-xfa-with-acroform.title: Replace XFA Form with AcroForm Using XML Template
replace-xfa-with-acroform.description: Demonstrates how to remove an existing XFA form from a PDF and create a static AcroForm by importing field definitions from an external XML template.

set-tooltip-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Tooltip for PDF Form Field (Email)
set-tooltip-for-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, locating the 'Email' form field, setting its tooltip (alternate name) to guide users on the required email format, and saving the updated document.

add-signature-field-with-image-stamp.title: Add Signature Field with Image Stamp to PDF
add-signature-field-with-image-stamp.description: Shows how to create a signature form field named 'ClientSignature' in a PDF and set its visual appearance using a predefined image stamp with Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-and-lock-signature-field.title: Sign PDF and Lock Signature Field
sign-pdf-and-lock-signature-field.description: Shows how to digitally sign a PDF signature field with a PKCS#7 certificate and then lock the field to prevent any further edits during review.

create-hidden-calculation-field.title: Create Hidden Calculation Field in PDF with JavaScript
create-hidden-calculation-field.description: Shows how to add a hidden numeric field to a PDF and attach a JavaScript OnCalculate action that sums the values of two existing fields (Item1 and Item2) using Aspose.Pdf.

export-selected-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export Selected PDF Form Fields to XML
export-selected-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, select specific form fields by name, and write their values into an XML document.

update-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.title: Update PDF Form Fields from XML Subset
update-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read an XML file that contains a subset of form field values, and update the matching fields in the PDF form before saving.

date-field-validation-with-regex.title: Add Date Field with MM/DD/YYYY Validation
date-field-validation-with-regex.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF form with a DateField, setting its display format, and attaching a JavaScript OnValidate action that checks the input against an MM/DD/YYYY regular expression.

set-password-field-max-length.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Password Field
set-password-field-max-length.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a password form field, set its maximum character length to 20, and save the updated document.

create-pdf-form-template-fill-from-json.title: Create PDF Form Template and Fill from JSON
create-pdf-form-template-fill-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically create a PDF form with placeholder fields using Aspose.Pdf, write matching JSON data, and then populate the form fields from the JSON file.

batch-fill-pdf-forms-from-csv.title: Batch Fill PDF Form Templates from CSV Data
batch-fill-pdf-forms-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file, map its columns to PDF form fields, and generate a filled PDF for each data row using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-data-from-xml-with-error-han.title: Import Form Data from XML with Error Handling
import-form-data-from-xml-with-error-han.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, optionally binding form data from an XML file, and handling missing files or binding errors to avoid runtime exceptions.

set-field-visibility-based-on-other-fiel.title: Set Form Field Visibility Based on Another Field Value
set-field-visibility-based-on-other-fiel.description: Shows how to attach JavaScript to a PDF form field with Aspose.Pdf so that the visibility of a target field is toggled depending on the source field's value.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v3.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Schema
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v3.description: Shows how to load a PDF document, set JSON export options, and export the form field definitions to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-acroform-fields-from-json__v2.title: Import AcroForm Fields from JSON Schema
import-acroform-fields-from-json__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a JSON form schema and generate corresponding AcroForm fields in a new PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-checkbox-default-checked.title: Set Checkbox Default State to Checked in PDF
set-checkbox-default-checked.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a checkbox form field, and programmatically set its default value to checked using Aspose.Pdf.

add-submit-button-http-post-pdf.title: Add Submit Button with HTTP POST to PDF
add-submit-button-http-post-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a push button in a PDF that submits form data using the HTTP POST method in URL‑encoded format with Aspose.Pdf.

add-reset-button-to-pdf-form__v2.title: Add Reset Button to PDF Form
add-reset-button-to-pdf-form__v2.description: Shows how to place a push button on an existing PDF form that clears all user‑entered data by executing JavaScript when clicked.

set-export-value-radio-button-option.title: Set Export Value for Radio Button Option in PDF Form
set-export-value-radio-button-option.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a radio button field, change the export value of a specific option, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-hidden-guid-tracking-fie.title: Create PDF with Hidden GUID Tracking Field
create-pdf-with-hidden-guid-tracking-fie.description: Demonstrates generating a GUID at runtime and storing it in a hidden text box field inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

transform-import-pdf-form-data-json.title: Transform and Import PDF Form Data via JSON
transform-import-pdf-form-data-json.description: The example creates a source PDF with a form field, exports its data to JSON, renames a field, and imports the transformed data into a target PDF.

set-initial-zoom-level-for-pdf-form.title: Set Initial Zoom Level for PDF Form
set-initial-zoom-level-for-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to set the initial view zoom level of a PDF form by assigning an XYZExplicitDestination to the document's OpenAction and saving the result.

lock-pdf-form-fields.title: Lock PDF Form Fields After Completion
lock-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set each form field to read‑only to prevent further edits, and save the locked document.

create-pdf-form-with-barcode.title: Create PDF Form with Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-barcode.description: Shows how to generate a PDF form that contains a Code128 barcode field using Aspose.Pdf.

set-max-file-size-for-pdf-form-attachmen.title: Set Maximum File Size for PDF Form Attachment to 2 MB
set-max-file-size-for-pdf-form-attachmen.description: Demonstrates how to limit the size of files that can be attached to a PDF form field to 2 MB using Aspose.Pdf's global memory‑loading limit and FormEditor.

export-pdf-form-field-metadata-to-csv.title: Export PDF Form Field Metadata to CSV
export-pdf-form-field-metadata-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF, extracts each form field's name, type, and default value, and writes the information to a CSV file for auditing purposes.

import-form-fields-from-csv.title: Import Form Field Definitions from CSV into PDF
import-form-fields-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file containing form field metadata and programmatically create matching PDF form fields using Aspose.Pdf.

add-date-picker-field-current-date.title: Add Date Picker Field with Current Date to PDF
add-date-picker-field-current-date.description: Shows how to insert a date picker form field into an existing PDF and set its default value to the current system date using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-date-field-minimum-date.title: Validate Date Field Minimum Date in PDF
validate-date-field-minimum-date.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a date picker form field and attach JavaScript validation that rejects dates earlier than January 1, 2000.

dynamic-listbox-add-item.title: Create Dynamic ListBox with Add‑Item Button in PDF
dynamic-listbox-add-item.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form containing a ListBox that can grow dynamically when a user clicks a button, using JavaScript attached to the button's mouse‑up action.

duplicate-rename-pdf-form-field.title: Duplicate and Rename PDF Form Field
duplicate-rename-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically copy an existing form field, assign each copy a unique name, reposition them to avoid overlap, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-email-validation-to-pdf-form.title: Add JavaScript Email Validation to a PDF Form Field
add-email-validation-to-pdf-form.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextBox form field for an email address, attaches a JavaScript validation script that checks for the '@' character, and saves the updated document.

create-pdf-form-tax-calculation.title: Create PDF Form with Automatic Tax Calculation
create-pdf-form-tax-calculation.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form with subtotal and tax rate fields and a read‑only tax amount field that is calculated automatically using JavaScript.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML after Setting Tax Value
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml__v2.description: Loads a PDF form, assigns a value to the Tax field, and saves the entire form data as an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-tax-rate-from-xml.title: Import Tax Rate from XML into PDF Hidden Form Field
import-tax-rate-from-xml.description: Shows how to read a tax rate from an XML file and set the value of a hidden form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-noexport-flag-for-sensitive-pdf-form.title: Set NoExport Flag for Sensitive PDF Form Fields
set-noexport-flag-for-sensitive-pdf-form.description: Loads a PDF, identifies sensitive form fields by name, marks them as non‑exportable (NoExport) and saves the updated document.

pdf-form-language-dependent-labels.title: Create PDF Form with Language‑Dependent Labels
pdf-form-language-dependent-labels.description: Shows how to add a language selection combo box to a PDF form and use JavaScript to dynamically change another field's label based on the selected language.

mark-pdf-form-field-required.title: Mark PDF Form Field as Required with Red Border
mark-pdf-form-field-required.description: Demonstrates how to set a PDF form field as required so that PDF viewers display a red border when the field is left empty after form submission, using Aspose.Pdf.

auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.title: Auto‑Update QR Code Field from Text Field
auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to make a QR code barcode field update automatically when a linked text field changes by enabling auto‑recalculation and attaching JavaScript to the text field.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-and-transfor.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML and Transform to Custom Report
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-and-transfor.description: Demonstrates how to export form fields from a PDF to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf, then apply an XSLT stylesheet to generate a custom report such as HTML.

import-xfdf-data-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF to Repopulate Form Fields
import-xfdf-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read transformed XFDF (XML) containing updated form values, import those values into the PDF, and save the repopulated document.

create-multi-select-list-box__v2.title: Create Multi‑Select List Box in PDF Form
create-multi-select-list-box__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a list box field to a PDF form, enable multi‑selection, populate options, and set default selected items using Aspose.Pdf.

create-multi-select-listbox-max-three.title: Create Multi‑Select List Box with Maximum Three Selections
create-multi-select-listbox-max-three.description: Shows how to add a multi‑select list box to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, populate it with options, enable multi‑selection, and pre‑select up to three items.

add-hidden-ip-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden IP Field to PDF with JavaScript
add-hidden-ip-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a hidden text box form field in a PDF and set its value to the user's IP address via JavaScript executed on document open.

add-ipv4-validation-to-pdf-textbox.title: Add IPv4 Validation to PDF TextBox Field
add-ipv4-validation-to-pdf-textbox.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a text box form field and attach JavaScript that validates the entered value against an IPv4 address pattern using a regular expression.

create-pdf-form-digital-signature.title: Create PDF Form with Digital Signature and Certificate Validation
create-pdf-form-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF form, sign it with a PFX certificate using PKCS#1, verify the signature, and save the signed document.

require-signature-field-lock-pdf.title: Require Signature Field and Lock PDF After Signing
require-signature-field-lock-pdf.description: Shows how to add a required digital signature field, sign it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and lock the PDF to prevent any further modifications.

export-pdf-signature-to-xml-audit.title: Export PDF Signature Details to XML Audit Log
export-pdf-signature-to-xml-audit.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts information from each signature field, and writes the details to an XML file for audit purposes.

import-xml-signature-data-and-sign-pdf.title: Import XML Signature Data and Sign PDF
import-xml-signature-data-and-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with a signature field, importing digital signature information from an XFA XML file, and applying a PKCS#7 signature using a PFX certificate.

create-password-protected-pdf-form.title: Create Password Protected PDF Form with Encryption
create-password-protected-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates adding a text box field to a PDF, configuring its appearance, and then encrypting the document with user and owner passwords so that opening or editing requires authentication.

validate-incorrect-password-prevents-acc.title: Validate Incorrect Password Prevents Access to Encrypted PDF Form Field
validate-incorrect-password-prevents-acc.description: The example creates a PDF with a password‑protected form field, encrypts the document, then demonstrates that opening it with a wrong password throws an exception while the correct password allows reading the field value.

create-pdf-form-auto-backup.title: Create PDF Form with Auto Backup on Field Change
create-pdf-form-auto-backup.description: Shows how to build a PDF form with a text box field and attach JavaScript that automatically saves a backup copy whenever the field value is modified.

add-javascript-listener-to-pdf-form-fiel.title: Add JavaScript Listener to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-listener-to-pdf-form-fiel.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field that fires when the field's value changes, using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v4.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v4.description: Shows how to export all form field definitions, including appearance settings, from a PDF document to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-appearance-from-json.title: Import Form Appearance Settings from JSON into PDF
import-form-appearance-from-json.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing form field appearance settings (and values) from a JSON file, and saving the updated document.

create-collapsible-section-in-pdf-form.title: Create Collapsible Section in PDF Form
create-collapsible-section-in-pdf-form.description: Shows how to add a checkbox that toggles the visibility of a text field via JavaScript, creating a collapsible section within a PDF form.

create-collapsible-pdf-section.title: Create Collapsible PDF Section with Outline Bookmark
create-collapsible-pdf-section.description: Demonstrates how to add a bookmark (outline) to a PDF and set its initial state to collapsed using the Open property.

calculate-total-price-pdf-form.title: Calculate Total Price in PDF Form Using JavaScript
calculate-total-price-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add numeric form fields to a PDF, attach a JavaScript calculation that multiplies quantity and unit price, and display the read‑only total with automatic recalculation.

export-total-price-to-xml.title: Export Total Price to XML via PDF
export-total-price-to-xml.description: Shows how to create a PDF containing a total price and export its content to XML using Aspose.Pdf for invoicing integration.

generate-invoice-pdf-with-xml-discounts.title: Generate Invoice PDF with XML Discount Rates
generate-invoice-pdf-with-xml-discounts.description: The example reads discount rates from an XML file, applies them to a list of items, calculates the total price, and writes the result into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-pdf-only-attachment.title: Create PDF Form with PDF‑Only File Attachment Field
create-pdf-form-pdf-only-attachment.description: Shows how to add a text box field to a PDF form and apply JavaScript validation so that only files with a .pdf extension are accepted.

validate-pdf-file-size.title: Validate PDF File Size Before Form Submission
validate-pdf-file-size.description: Shows how to enforce a 5 MB limit on an uploaded PDF by setting Aspose.Pdf's FileSizeLimitToMemoryLoading property and handling PdfException during document loading.

add-progress-bar-to-pdf-form.title: Add Progress Bar to PDF Form
add-progress-bar-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to create a progress bar field in a PDF form and update its value with JavaScript as the user fills out other form sections.

export-pdf-conversion-progress-to-xml.title: Export PDF Conversion Progress to XML
export-pdf-conversion-progress-to-xml.description: Shows how to capture Aspose.Pdf HTML conversion progress events and write them to an XML file for external tracking.

add-locale-translation-to-pdf-form-label.title: Add Locale‑Based Translation to PDF Form Labels with JavaScript
add-locale-translation-to-pdf-form-label.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with form fields and use a document‑level JavaScript dictionary to change a label's text based on the selected locale.

create-pdf-form-with-validation.title: Create PDF Form with Required Field Validation
create-pdf-form-with-validation.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form with a required text box and a submit button that runs JavaScript to ensure all required fields are filled before submission.

create-pdf-form-with-hidden-interaction-.title: Create PDF Form with Hidden Interaction Log
create-pdf-form-with-hidden-interaction-.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible text box to a PDF form and capture user interactions in a hidden log field using JavaScript actions.

export-pdf-form-interaction-log-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Interaction Log to XFDF
export-pdf-form-interaction-log-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to export a PDF form's annotations and field values to an XFDF (XML) file for server‑side analysis after a form submission.

import-xfdf-interaction-logs-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Interaction Logs into PDF
import-xfdf-interaction-logs-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing annotations from an XFDF (XML) interaction log file, and saving the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-auto-updating-date-time-field-to-pdf.title: Add Auto‑Updating Date/Time Field to PDF
add-auto-updating-date-time-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a DateField into a PDF and attach JavaScript so the field automatically displays the current date and time each time the document is opened or viewed.

add-readonly-date-field-to-pdf.title: Add Read‑Only Date Field to PDF Form
add-readonly-date-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a DateField in a PDF, set its initial value, and mark it as read‑only using Aspose.Pdf.

conditional-pdf-section-checkbox.title: Create Conditional PDF Section Controlled by a Checkbox
conditional-pdf-section-checkbox.description: Demonstrates how to add a checkbox and a text field to a PDF and use JavaScript actions to show or hide the text field based on the checkbox state.

export-conditional-visibility-state-to-x.title: Export Conditional Visibility State to XML
export-conditional-visibility-state-to-x.description: Demonstrates iterating through PDF annotations, toggling HideAction visibility, marking widget annotations as exportable, and saving the document's state to an XML file to preserve user preferences across sessions.

import-annotation-visibility-from-xml.title: Import Annotation Visibility from XML and Apply to PDF
import-annotation-visibility-from-xml.description: Loads visibility settings from an XML file and updates the Hidden flag of PDF annotations accordingly, then saves the modified document.

create-pdf-form-with-concatenated-barcod.title: Create PDF Form with Concatenated Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-concatenated-barcod.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form with text fields, concatenate their values, and generate a barcode field from the combined string using Aspose.Pdf.

create-code128-barcode-linked-to-text-fi.title: Create Code128 Barcode Field Linked to Text Field
create-code128-barcode-linked-to-text-fi.description: Demonstrates adding a Code‑128 barcode field to a PDF and linking it to a text box so the barcode updates automatically when the source field changes.

export-pdf-barcode-fields-to-xml.title: Export PDF Barcode Fields to XML
export-pdf-barcode-fields-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all barcode form fields and writes their names and values to an XML file for integration with inventory systems.
